memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_QMC_Settings *QMCSettingsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetQMCSettings

briefdescription.para: This API is used to update various QMC settings, eg gain, phase, offset etc.

detaileddescription.para: QMC settings passed are used to update the corresponding block level registers. Driver structure is updated with the new values.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
is Pointer to the XRFdc_QMC_Settings structure in which the QMC settings are passed.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_QMC_Settings *QMCSettingsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetQMCSettings

briefdescription.para: QMC settings are returned back to the caller through this API.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer to the XRFdc_QMC_Settings structure in which the QMC settings are passed.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_CoarseDelay_Settings *CoarseDelaySettingsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetCoarseDelaySettings

briefdescription.para: Coarse delay settings passed are used to update the corresponding block level registers.

detaileddescription.para: Driver structure is updated with the new values.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
is Pointer to the XRFdc_CoarseDelay_Settings structure in which the CoarseDelay settings are passed.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_CoarseDelay_Settings *CoarseDelaySettingsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetCoarseDelaySettings

briefdescription.para: Coarse delay settings are returned back to the caller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer to the XRFdc_CoarseDelay_Settings structure in which the Coarse Delay settings are passed.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 ThresholdToUpdate)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_ThresholdStickyClear

briefdescription.para: This API is to clear the Sticky bit in threshold config registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Select which Threshold (Threshold0 or Threshold1 or both) to update.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 ThresholdToUpdate, u32 ClrMode)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetThresholdClrMode

briefdescription.para: This API sets the threshold clear mode.

detaileddescription.para: The clear mode can be through explicit DRP access (manual) or auto clear (QMC gain update event).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADCC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Select which Threshold (Threshold0 or Threshold1 or both) to update.
can be DRP access (manual) or auto clear (QMC gain update event).

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_Threshold_Settings *ThresholdSettingsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetThresholdSettings

briefdescription.para: Threshold settings are updated into the relevant registers.

detaileddescription.para: Driver structure is updated with the new values. There can be two threshold settings: threshold0 and threshold1. Both of them are independent of each other. The function returns the requested threshold (which can be threshold0, threshold1, or both.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer through which the register settings for thresholds are passed to the API.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_Threshold_Settings *ThresholdSettingsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetThresholdSettings

briefdescription.para: Threshold settings are read from the corresponding registers and are passed back to the caller.

detaileddescription.para: There can be two threshold settings: threshold0 and threshold1. Both of them are independent of each other. The function returns the requested threshold (which can be threshold0, threshold1, or both.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer through which the register settings for thresholds are passed back..

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 DecoderMode)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetDecoderMode

briefdescription.para: Decoder mode is updated into the relevant registers.

detaileddescription.para: Driver structure is updated with the new values.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Valid values are 1 (Maximum SNR, for non- randomized decoder), 2 (Maximum Linearity, for randomized decoder)

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *DecoderModePtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetDecoderMode

briefdescription.para: Decoder mode is read and returned back.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Valid values are 1 (Maximum SNR, for non-randomized decoder), 2 (Maximum Linearity, for randomized decoder)

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *OutputCurrPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetOutputCurr

briefdescription.para: Get Output Current for DAC block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
pointer to return the output current.

listitem.para: Return Output Current for DAC block

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 NyquistZone)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetNyquistZone

briefdescription.para: Set the Nyquist zone.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 1 (Odd),2 (Even).

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *NyquistZonePtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetNyquistZone

briefdescription.para: Get the Nyquist zone.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer to return the Nyquist zone.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u8 CalibrationMode)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetCalibrationMode

briefdescription.para: This API is to set the Calibration mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 0(Gen 3 only), 1 and 2.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u8 *CalibrationModePtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetCalibrationMode

briefdescription.para: This API is to get the Calibration mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
pointer to get the calibration mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *ModePtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetCoupling

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get the Coupling mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC.
indicates Tile number.
indicates Block number.
pointer to get link coupling mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *ModePtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetLinkCoupling

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get the Link Coupling mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
indicates Block number(0-3 for 2G, 0-1 for 4G).
pointer to get link coupling mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 Mode)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetDither

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set the IM3 Dither mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
indicates Block number(0-3 for LS, 0-1 for HS).
0: Disable 1: Enable

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *ModePtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetDither

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get the IM3 Dither mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
indicates Block number(0-3 for LS, 0-1 for HS).
pointer to get link coupling mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_Signal_Detector_Settings *SettingsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetSignalDetector

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set the ADC Signal Detector Settings.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
indicates Block number(0-3 for LS, 0-1 for HS).
pointer to the XRFdc_Signal_Detector_Settings structure to set the signal detector configurations

listitem.para: XRFDC_FAILURE if tile not enabled, or invalid values.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_Signal_Detector_Settings *SettingsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetSignalDetector

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get the ADC Signal Detector Settings.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
indicates Block number(0-3 for LS, 0-1 for HS).
pointer to the XRFdc_Signal_Detector_Settings structure to get the signal detector configurations

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 CalibrationBlock)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_DisableCoefficientsOverride

briefdescription.para: This function is used to disable Calibration Coefficients override.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
indicates Block number(0-3 for LS, 0-1 for HS).
indicates the calibration block.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 CalibrationBlock, XRFdc_Calibration_Coefficients *CoeffPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetCalCoefficients

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set the ADC Calibration Coefficients.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
indicates Block number(0-3 for LS, 0-1 for HS).
indicates the block to be written to.
is pointer to the XRFdc_Calibration_Coefficients structure to set the calibration coefficients.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 CalibrationBlock, XRFdc_Calibration_Coefficients *CoeffPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetCalCoefficients

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get the ADC Calibration Coefficients.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
indicates Block number(0-3 for LS, 0-1 for HS).
indicates the block to be read from
is pointer to the XRFdc_Calibration_Coefficients structure to get the calibration coefficients.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_Cal_Freeze_Settings *CalFreezePtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetCalFreeze

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set calibration freeze settings.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
indicates Block number(0-3 for LS, 0-1 for HS).
pointer to the settings to be applied.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_Cal_Freeze_Settings *CalFreezePtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetCalFreeze

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get calibration freeze settings and status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
indicates Block number(0-3 for LS, 0-1 for HS).
pointer to be filled the settings/status.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 uACurrent)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetDACVOP

briefdescription.para: Set Output Current for DAC block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
is the current in uA.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *EnabledPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetDACCompMode

briefdescription.para: Gets VOP compatibility mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
is pointer a that is filled with whether the mode is enabled (1) or disabled(0).

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 Enable)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetDACCompMode

briefdescription.para: Sets VOP compatibility mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
is whether to enable (1) or disable(0) the compatibility mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_DSA_Settings *SettingsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetDSA

briefdescription.para: Set DSA for ADC block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
is the attenuation in dB

simplesect.para: Range 0 - 11 dB with 0.5 dB resolution ES1 Si. Range 0 - 27 dB with 1 dB resolution for Production Si.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_DSA_Settings *SettingsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetDSA

briefdescription.para: Get DSA for ADC block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
is the attenuation in dB

simplesect.para: Range 0 - 11 dB with 0.5 dB resolution ES1 Si. Range 0 - 27 dB with 1 dB resolution for Production Si.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_IsDACBlockEnabled

briefdescription.para: Checks whether DAC block is available or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.

listitem.para: Return 1 if DAC block is available, otherwise 0.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_IsADCBlockEnabled

briefdescription.para: Checks whether ADC block is available or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3 in DAC/ADC-2GSPS and 0-1 in ADC-4GSPS.

listitem.para: Return 1 if ADC block is available, otherwise 0.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_CheckBlockEnabled

briefdescription.para: Checks whether ADC/DAC block is enabled or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetInverseSincFilter

briefdescription.para: Get Inversesync filter for DAC block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.

listitem.para: Return Inversesync filter for DAC block

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetMixedMode

briefdescription.para: Get Mixed mode for DAC block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.

listitem.para: Return mixed mode for DAC block

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 Enable)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetDACDataScaler

briefdescription.para: Set data scaler for DAC block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 1 (enable) and 0 (disable).

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *EnablePtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetDACDataScaler

briefdescription.para: Get data scaler for DAC block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 1 (enable) and 0 (disable).
